```markdown
Based on the provided evidence, I find support for the statement "small baby" (option c) and disagreement with "beta agonist drugs are CI during delivery" (option b).
Evidence supports that infants of diabetic mothers tend to be smaller due to increased intrauterine growth restriction secondary to prolonged exposure to elevated maternal glucose levels. This aligns closely with point c.
